a: Blog article SEO: catchy title 50-60 chars with primary keyword, meta description 150-160 chars with CTA, H1=title, H2/H3 subheadings every 200-300 words, keyword in first 100 words, internal link placeholders, readable short paragraphs, conclusion with takeaway. Target one search intent. Original helpful content beats keyword stuffing worldwide.

For email marketing topics: address pain points (low open rates, spam folder), include actionable tips, mention tools generically, use data-backed claims carefully, add FAQ section for featured snippets. Primary keyword in title, URL slug, and first paragraph.

Hindi SEO content: write naturally in Hindi (Devanagari), use local examples and INR context where relevant, keep title under 60 characters, meta in Hindi under 160 chars. H2 headings in Hindi. Mix English product names when commonly used (email, SEO, digital marketing).

How-to guides: title format 'How to [action] [topic] (Year Guide)', numbered steps as H2 or H3, prerequisites section, tools needed list, common mistakes section, estimated time. Schema-friendly step structure. Answer People Also Ask queries.

Listicles: use numbers in title ('10 Best...', '7 Ways to...'), each item as H2 with 80-120 words, include pros/cons, comparison table markdown optional, summary ranking at end. Great for commercial and informational intent worldwide.

Landing page SEO copy: above-fold value proposition, 3-5 benefit bullets, social proof, objection handling, single clear CTA. Primary keyword in H1 and meta. Local landing pages add city/region. Mobile-first short sentences.

Product description SEO: unique copy (no manufacturer duplicate), benefits before features, target keywords naturally, specs as bullet list, trust badges, FAQ for long-tail. Include use cases and who it is for.

Local SEO content: '[Service] in [City]' title pattern, mention neighborhoods served, local landmarks, NAP consistency, service area paragraph, customer testimonials placeholder, Google Business Profile link CTA. Works for India, US, UK, UAE, worldwide.
News/update posts: inverted pyramid — key news first, date context, why it matters, expert quote placeholder, what's next. Freshness signals for Google. Keep under 800 words unless deep analysis.
E-commerce buying guides: comparison criteria, budget tiers, top picks with H2 each, buying checklist, seasonal tips. Affiliate-friendly structure. Keywords: best, review, vs, buying guide.

European multilingual SEO: write in target language entirely, adapt idioms not literal translation, use local spelling (colour vs color), hreflang awareness, culturally relevant examples. Meta and title in same language as body.

Arabic SEO content: RTL-friendly structure in CMS, Arabic title and meta, bilingual sites can use English slug with Arabic content. Local payment and shipping context for ecommerce. Formal Modern Standard Arabic for B2B.

Advanced worldwide SEO writing: match search intent (informational/commercial/transactional), E-E-A-T signals (expertise, experience), semantic keywords and LSI terms, featured snippet optimization (40-60 word answers under H2), table of contents for long posts, image alt text placeholders.

Digital marketing SEO articles: cover SEO, PPC, social, email, analytics pillars, use case studies structure, 2026 trends section, tool-agnostic advice, beginner and advanced subsections. Internal linking to related topics.

Flutter/mobile dev SEO: technical but readable, code mention sparingly, compare approaches, performance and UX benefits, app store optimization cross-link, developer audience tone informative authoritative.

Health/YMYL content: avoid medical claims without disclaimers, cite reputable sources placeholder, empathetic tone, E-E-A-T critical. Add 'consult a professional' disclaimer. Informational not diagnostic.
Finance SEO: compliance-aware language, no guaranteed returns, explain risks, use tables for comparisons, disclaimer for not financial advice, authoritative tone, data with dates.
Professional informative tone: clear, confident, no slang, second person 'you' acceptable, active voice, short paragraphs 2-4 sentences, transition words between sections, scannable bullets.
Persuasive tone: problem-agitate-solve framework, emotional hooks balanced with logic, urgency without false scarcity, benefit-driven headlines, power words sparingly.

Meta description formula: primary keyword + unique value + benefit + soft CTA. 150-160 characters. Example pattern: 'Discover [topic] with proven tips for [audience]. Learn [benefit] and [action] today.' Unique per page.

Title tag formulas: 'Primary Keyword: Benefit (Year)' or 'How to [Keyword] — Complete Guide' or '[Number] Best [Keyword] for [Audience]'. Keep under 60 chars, front-load keyword, brand at end optional.

Word count: informational guides 800-1500 words, local pages 400-700, product descriptions 150-300, landing pages 400-800, news 300-600. Match top-ranking competitors depth. Quality over arbitrary length.

Internal links: 2-4 contextual anchor texts per 1000 words, link to related guides, use descriptive anchors not 'click here', pillar-cluster model. Placeholder [link: related topic] acceptable in drafts.

Featured snippets: pose question as H2, answer in 40-55 words immediately below, use lists and tables for step queries, definition boxes for 'what is' queries. Structure content for Google extractability.

India audience SEO: mix English with Hindi terms where natural, mention UPI, GST, tier-2 cities growth, mobile-first users, affordable solutions angle, festival season timing for ecommerce, .in domain trust.
B2B SaaS SEO content: pain points, ROI metrics, integration ecosystem, security/compliance section, case study structure, comparison vs spreadsheets/status quo, demo CTA.
Conclusion patterns: recap 3 key points, single clear CTA (subscribe, contact, try free), optional FAQ H2 with 3 questions, related reading links. Never introduce new topics in conclusion.

Structured SEO output JSON shape: {"metadata":{"title":"...","meta_description":"..."},"keywords":["..."],"outline":["H2 section 1","H2 section 2"],"content":{"article":"markdown without FAQ block","tone":"professional"},"faqs":[{"question":"...","answer":"..."}]} Keep FAQs separate from article body. Outline lists H2 sections only.

Aesthetic worldwide SEO: scannable H2/H3, short paragraphs, inclusive language, mobile-first layout, benefit-led headings, no keyword stuffing, cultural sensitivity, local examples without stereotypes. Works for all categories and languages.
